haiku45.summary_excerpt: CRITICAL FAILURE: Deliverable is incomplete. Task explicitly requires TDD (tests first), all tests runnable via `bun test`, test execution through `act`, and `act-result.txt` artifact—NONE provided. Workflow has multiple issues: uses curl|bash instead of oven-sh/setup-bun@v1 (best practice), "Show results" step fails if files missing, no git user config for CI, runs on PRs (should be push-only), doesn't validate output or set up test scenarios. main.ts has code duplication (readFileSync/writeFil

gemini31pro.summary_excerpt: Excellent modular TypeScript implementation using Bun-native APIs (Bun.spawnSync). The script handles Git history and version file updates robustly. Workflow includes fetch-depth: 0 for history. Minor ding for using a raw shell script to install Bun instead of the oven-sh/setup-bun action.
